subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl, upon thee be the glory of thy Lord, the All-Glorious! On this precious and wondrous day, His Excellency 'Alí-Qablí-Muhammad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل علیک بهاء ربک الجلیل در این یوم عزیز بدیع جناب علی قبل محمد علیه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
